metadata.title: Ubuntu System Assessment Results - FedRAMP High

activities.title: Mapped XCCDF evidence analysis
activities.description: XCCDF rule results were normalized and mapped to FedRAMP Rev 5 High control identifiers.

steps.title: Parse XCCDF rule results
steps.description: Collected rule pass/fail results for all 6 Ubuntu servers.

steps.title: Map rules to controls
steps.description: Used component definition implemented-requirement Rule_Id properties to associate evidence with controls.

results.title: FedRAMP Rev 5 High assessment execution results
results.description: Assessment results for the Ubuntu 24.04 LTS 6-server fleet evaluated against FedRAMP Rev 5 High using mapped XCCDF evidence.

entries.title: XCCDF scans executed
entries.description: Executed OpenSCAP security compliance scans on 6 Ubuntu 24.04 LTS servers.

entries.title: Control mapping analysis completed
entries.description: Mapped rule-level evidence to control identifiers using component definitions and regulatory mappings.

observations.title: Control ac-1 assessment outcome
observations.description: Control ac-1 is partially-satisfied based on 21 passing and 3 failing mapped XCCDF rule evaluations across 6 assessed subjects.
